TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nu Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku kakiliman u Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku nu Cung-mei-cul a Ma-ya tademaw nu micidekay a kungku, ayda nayay tu ku laylay nu Ma-ya, i tida satu mikilul tu nadipaan mikiling aca tu naayaway a laylay. u nikatinengan, u Ma-ya a tademaw misasincya tu Ma-ya a hungti nu misimaway a kakawusan:u Mei-cul lukedaw, takupuwan a misimaway : u bahelay a ayam, paudipay a kilang : u ji-pei kilang. u Ma-yaay a tademaw naw u ji-pei kilang nu tabakiay a kilang, patatengan tu nipacuked tu pabaway atu nu tademaway a kilang( mahida nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku ), mahida u adingu nu mapatayay micumud i tingkukud a dadan. nilacul sayaway nu Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku "pulpulel¬∑wu" sayaway a nisabaluhay a kungku taneng katinengan tu micidekay a kungkuan, sayaway nu kitakit, u mahidaay nu hekalay atu nu i bayuay kaahebal, ayda han tu way sa tahekal tu Te-pei-wu atu Ku-kut-ma-ci. kungku nu midepiday a lala ku sapisanga' tu kakawusan nu tademaw, nika hina malatak ku lala. sisa u kilang ku sapisanga' tu kakawusan a tademaw, nayay ku balucu' nayay ku bunuh, maliyuh misunga'ay tu kakawusan, u udad sa tu ku palawpesay. satikuday u kalawlawan atu salengacay nu kubkub palamihunen ku sasanga'an tu tademaw, makaadih ku kakawusan manamuh. u Ma-ya tademaw nu kakawusan a nipapisanga', kyu idaw ku nu kubkuban a tademaw. u kakawusan nu kubkub ci Yu-mu-ka-ke-si u kakawusan nu kubkub mahida u Ma-ya a laylay i kitakit tu nu aadihan nu mayilayay. i "pulpulel¬∑wu" tu nisapaluhayan a nisulit tu kungku taneng matineng tu nu kubkubay a kakawusan namakay lalaay nisabaluhay mulangaw, mala nu takupuwan tu nu walian, timul, etip atu amisay, mulalad katukuh i lala nu cukecukedan nu paudipay a kilang: ji-pei kilang.
S.PHON: nu ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman u ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ¶uŇč-m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ a ma-ja tad…ômaw nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, ajda najaj tu ku r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ma-ja, i tida satu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nadipaan mikir~…ĺiŇč a ¶a tu naajawaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. u nikatin…ôŇčan, u ma-ja a tad…ômaw misasin ¶ja tu ma-ja a ńßuŇčti nu misimawaj a kakawusan:u m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺuk…ôdaw, takupuwan a misimawaj : u bańß…ôr~…ĺaj a ajam, paudipaj a kir~…ĺaŇč : u ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč. u ma-jaaj a tad…ômaw naw u ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč nu tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, patat…ôŇčan tu nipa ¶uk…ôd tu pabawaj atu nu tad…ômawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč( mańßida nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ), mańßida u adiŇču nu mapatajaj mi ¶umud i tiŇčkukud a dadan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ sajawaj nu ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku "pur~…ĺpur~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ*wu" sajawaj a nisabar~…ĺuńßaj a kuŇčku tan…ôŇč katin…ôŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčkuan, sajawaj nu kitakit, u mańßidaaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu nu i bajuaj kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, ajda ńßan tu waj sa tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu t…ô-p…ôi-wu atu ku-kut-ma- ¶i. kuŇčku nu mid…ôpidaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kakawusan nu tad…ômaw, nika ńßina mar~…ĺatak ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa. sisa u kir~…ĺaŇč ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kakawusan a tad…ômaw, najaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° najaj ku bunuńß, mar~…ĺijuńß misuŇča Ē~ °aj tu kakawusan, u udad sa tu ku par~…ĺawp…ôsaj. satikudaj u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu kubkub par~…ĺamińßun…ôn ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an tu tad…ômaw, makaadińß ku kakawusan manamuńß. u ma-ja tad…ômaw nu kakawusan a nipapisaŇča Ē~ °, kju idaw ku nu kubkuban a tad…ômaw. u kakawusan nu kubkub ¶i ju-mu-ka-k…ô-si u kakawusan nu kubkub mańßida u ma-ja a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj i kitakit tu nu aadińßan nu majir~…ĺajaj. i "pur~…ĺpur~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ*wu" tu nisapar~…ĺuńßajan a nisur~…ĺit tu kuŇčku tan…ôŇč matin…ôŇč tu nu kubkubaj a kakawusan namakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj nisabar~…ĺuńßaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw, mar~…ĺa nu takupuwan tu nu war~…ĺian, timur~…ĺ, …ôtip atu amisaj, mur~…ĺar~…ĺad katukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu ¶uk…ô ¶uk…ôdan nu paudipaj a kir~…ĺaŇč: ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč.
S.FORM: nu Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku kakiliman u Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku nu Cung-mei-cul a Ma-ya tademaw nu micidekay a kungku, ayda nayay tu ku laylay nu Ma-ya, i tida satu mikilul tu nadipaan mikiling aca tu naayaway a laylay. u nikatinengan, u Ma-ya a tademaw misasincya tu Ma-ya a hungti nu misimaway a kakawusan:u Mei-cul lukedaw, takupuwan a misimaway : u bahelay a ayam, paudipay a kilang : u ji-pei kilang. u Ma-yaay a tademaw naw u ji-pei kilang nu tabakiay a kilang, patatengan tu nipacuked tu pabaway atu nu tademaway a kilang( mahida nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku ), mahida u adingu nu mapatayay micumud i tingkukud a dadan. nilacul sayaway nu Ma-ya a micidekay a kungku "pulpulel¬∑wu" sayaway a nisabaluhay a kungku taneng katinengan tu micidekay a kungkuan, sayaway nu kitakit, u mahidaay nu hekalay atu nu i bayuay kaahebal, ayda han tu way sa tahekal tu Te-pei-wu atu Ku-kut-ma-ci. kungku nu midepiday a lala ku sapisanga' tu kakawusan nu tademaw, nika hina malatak ku lala. sisa u kilang ku sapisanga' tu kakawusan a tademaw, nayay ku balucu' nayay ku bunuh, maliyuh misunga'ay tu kakawusan, u udad sa tu ku palawpesay. satikuday u kalawlawan atu salengacay nu kubkub palamihunen ku sasanga'an tu tademaw, makaadih ku kakawusan manamuh. u Ma-ya tademaw nu kakawusan a nipapisanga', kyu idaw ku nu kubkuban a tademaw. u kakawusan nu kubkub ci Yu-mu-ka-ke-si u kakawusan nu kubkub mahida u Ma-ya a laylay i kitakit tu nu aadihan nu mayilayay. i "pulpulel¬∑wu" tu nisapaluhayan a nisulit tu kungku taneng matineng tu nu kubkubay a kakawusan namakay lalaay nisabaluhay mulangaw, mala nu takupuwan tu nu walian, timul, etip atu amisay, mulalad katukuh i lala nu cukecukedan nu paudipay a kilang: ji-pei kilang.
S.PHON: nu ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman u ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ¶uŇč-m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ a ma-ja tad…ômaw nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, ajda najaj tu ku r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu ma-ja, i tida satu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nadipaan mikir~…ĺiŇč a ¶a tu naajawaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. u nikatin…ôŇčan, u ma-ja a tad…ômaw misasin ¶ja tu ma-ja a ńßuŇčti nu misimawaj a kakawusan:u m…ôi- ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺuk…ôdaw, takupuwan a misimawaj : u bańß…ôr~…ĺaj a ajam, paudipaj a kir~…ĺaŇč : u ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč. u ma-jaaj a tad…ômaw naw u ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč nu tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč, patat…ôŇčan tu nipa ¶uk…ôd tu pabawaj atu nu tad…ômawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč( mańßida nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ), mańßida u adiŇču nu mapatajaj mi ¶umud i tiŇčkukud a dadan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ sajawaj nu ma-ja a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku "pur~…ĺpur~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ*wu" sajawaj a nisabar~…ĺuńßaj a kuŇčku tan…ôŇč katin…ôŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčkuan, sajawaj nu kitakit, u mańßidaaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu nu i bajuaj kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, ajda ńßan tu waj sa tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu t…ô-p…ôi-wu atu ku-kut-ma- ¶i. kuŇčku nu mid…ôpidaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kakawusan nu tad…ômaw, nika ńßina mar~…ĺatak ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa. sisa u kir~…ĺaŇč ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kakawusan a tad…ômaw, najaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° najaj ku bunuńß, mar~…ĺijuńß misuŇča Ē~ °aj tu kakawusan, u udad sa tu ku par~…ĺawp…ôsaj. satikudaj u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu kubkub par~…ĺamińßun…ôn ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an tu tad…ômaw, makaadińß ku kakawusan manamuńß. u ma-ja tad…ômaw nu kakawusan a nipapisaŇča Ē~ °, kju idaw ku nu kubkuban a tad…ômaw. u kakawusan nu kubkub ¶i ju-mu-ka-k…ô-si u kakawusan nu kubkub mańßida u ma-ja a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj i kitakit tu nu aadińßan nu majir~…ĺajaj. i "pur~…ĺpur~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ*wu" tu nisapar~…ĺuńßajan a nisur~…ĺit tu kuŇčku tan…ôŇč matin…ôŇč tu nu kubkubaj a kakawusan namakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj nisabar~…ĺuńßaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw, mar~…ĺa nu takupuwan tu nu war~…ĺian, timur~…ĺ, …ôtip atu amisaj, mur~…ĺar~…ĺad katukuńß i r~…ĺar~…ĺa nu ¶uk…ô ¶uk…ôdan nu paudipaj a kir~…ĺaŇč: ji-p…ôi kir~…ĺaŇč.
